# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service.local
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    upstream:
      name: user-upstream
      targets:
        - target: user1.local:8000
        - target: user2.local:8000
      healthchecks:
        active:
          http_path: /
          interval: 10
          healthy:
            interval: 30
            successes: 2
          unhealthy:
            interval: 3
            http_failures: 2

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service.local
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    upstream:
      name: order-upstream
      targets:
        - target: order1.local:8000
        - target: order2.local:8000
      healthchecks:
        active:
          http_path: /
          interval: 15
          healthy:
            interval: 30
            successes: 2
          unhealthy:
            interval: 5
            http_failures: 3

  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service.local
    routes:
      - name: payment-route
        paths:
          - /payments
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    upstream:
      name: payment-upstream
      targets:
        - target: payment1.local:8000
        - target: payment2.local:8000
      healthchecks:
        active:
          http_path: /
          interval: 20
          healthy:
            interval: 30
            successes: 2
          unhealthy:
            interval: 5
            http_failures: 2
